prompt: ARO snippet that uses a state machine to model an order lifecycle.
model_raw:
<think>

</think>

```aro
(Order Lifecycle: OrderStateMachine) {
    Create the <order> with the <status: pending>.
    When the <order: status> is <pending> {
        Return the<OK: status> for the <order>.
    }
    When the <order: status> is <processing> {
        Return the<OK: status> for the <order>.
    }
    When the <order: status> is <complete> {
        Return the<OK: status> for the <order>.
    }
    When the <order: status> is <cancelled> {
        Return the<OK: status> for the <order>.
    }
    Return the<OK: status> for the <order>.
}
```
